rawAdvertText:
Analytics Consultant - job post
Foundever
3.4

Full-time

 
Benefits
Pulled from the full job description

Annual leave
Company pension
Work from home
 
Full job description
Who are we?

Put simply, our mission is to be the solutions and the team behind the best experiences for the world’s leading brands. Wherever and whenever needed.

With 170,000 people working across the globe, Foundever™ securely connects brands with their customers 9 million times a day in 60+ languages. Our global footprint makes us one of the few true global players in the BPO industry.

The Opportunity:

We are seeking a dynamic and experienced Analytics Consultant to support the next phase of growth and innovation for Foundever’s English-speaking markets. The ideal candidate will be an analytical thinker, naturally inquisitive, with exceptional problem-solving skills.

In this role, you will combine industry knowledge with your technical capabilities to deliver analytics & Insight programs for our clients. These will help achieve a range of outcomes including optimising business processes, enhancing customer experiences and growing sales / revenue. You’ll work closely with internal stakeholders and client teams to design, pitch and deliver these programs of work across a wide range of sectors.

As part of the wider Analytics and Insight community, you will leverage your expertise in data analysis with strong stakeholder management skills to deliver high impact analysis and gain the buy-in of the business, our operations and our clients.

2+ years experience working with contact centre data is essential, please do not apply if you do not have this as a minimum otherwise your application will be declined.

Key Responsibilities:

Data Analysis

Lead analyst for the delivery of Insight & analytics programs
Support with the co-ordination of project resources and coaching / developing junior team members
Develop and deliver presentations to client teams, translating complex analysis into clear, business-friendly language.
Work with our BI & reporting team to design and fine tune insight dashboards, reports, and visualizations in Power BI.
Design and execute experiments (A/B testing) to validate insights and recommendations.
Stakeholder Management

Partner with clients to understand business objectives and translate them into analytical & insight solutions.
Present the findings of your analysis to stakeholders at all levels from Team Managers to C-suite.
Act as a trusted advisor to both operations and our clients, helping them leverage data to achieve their goals.
Solution Design

Develop insight into initiatives that lead to business process, technology or service improvements (cost reduction, CX or employee experience improvement, revenue growth / protection).
Track the implementation and success of solutions providing feedback and adjustment recommendations when required.
Stay up-to-date with the latest analytical tools, techniques and trends to continuously improve the impact and efficiency of analysis.
Sales & Solutions

Develop business cases and calculate ROI to enable our team to pitch for and win new business or expand our services for an existing client
Support our Insight & Analytics Director with the development of sales and analytics solutions , which will form part of a proposals to new prospects or the expansion of services for an existing account
Your profile & experience:

3+ years of experience in an analytics role, ideally in a BPO setting (desirable but not essential)
Hands on expertise in programming languages such as SQL, Python or R ideally in a cloud computing environment (ideally MS Azure)
Intermediate to expert knowledge of Power BI data visualisation
Knowledge of Azure cloud infrastructure e.g. Databricks is preferred but not essential
Strong communication skills, both written and verbal, with an ability to influence stakeholders.
Excellent problem-solving skills and critical thinking ability.
Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects in a fast-paced environment.
The Package:

Competitive salary of up to £50K, depending on experience
10% bonus based on company and personal performance
25 day annual leave + standard bank holidays
Competitive pension scheme
You will also have the benefit of working for a very secure and stable organisation that provides excellent working conditions and training as well as an aggressive growth strategy for the UK & SA which will open up careers opportunities for the right individual.

If this really interests you and you are attracted to pushing yourself to a rewarding career, then please apply now and our Recruitment Team will be more than happy to speak with you.

[ever] creative. [ever] committed. [ever] connected.
#corgb00

Pay: Up to £50,000.00 per year

Benefits:

Work from home
Work Location: Remote
shortCompanyReason: Global BPO company serving leading brands across 60+ languages.
shortRoleReason: Analytics consultant delivering insight and analytics programs for English-speaking markets.
companySummary: Foundever is a global BPO and customer experience company with a large international workforce and a focus on connecting brands with customers.
roleSummary: The role leads analytics and insight delivery, stakeholder engagement, dashboarding, experimentation, and sales support for client-facing programs.
headlineAttraction: Remote analytics role with client-facing impact and salary up to £50K.
rolePurpose: To deliver analytics and insight solutions that improve business processes, customer experience, and revenue outcomes for clients.
probablePriorities: Deliver high-impact analytics and insight programs
Build trust with clients and internal stakeholders
Support growth through proposals and business cases
advertSummary: Foundever is hiring an Analytics Consultant in the UK for a remote permanent full-time role paying up to £50,000. The role needs strong analytics, stakeholder management, Power BI, and contact centre data experience to deliver insight programs that improve processes, customer experience, and revenue.
personalisedIntro: I’m applying because this role sits right at the point where I do my best work: turning operational data into clear action, then helping people trust and use it. I’ve led performance, reporting and improvement in complex environments, and I’m comfortable working with stakeholders who need analysis that is practical, credible and tied to outcomes.
whyThisRole: This feels like a strong fit because the work is not just analysis for its own sake. It needs someone who can build insight, explain it clearly, test recommendations, and help clients and internal teams act on it. That is the kind of role where I can bring structure, judgement and follow-through.
coreResponsibilities: Lead delivery of insight and analytics programs
Coordinate project resources and support junior team members
Design and refine Power BI dashboards and reports
Run A/B tests to validate recommendations
Translate client objectives into analytical solutions
Present findings to stakeholders up to C-suite level
Advise operations and clients using data
Develop solutions for process, technology, service, and revenue improvements
Develop business cases and calculate ROI
essentialRequirements: 2+ years experience working with contact centre data
3+ years experience in an analytics role
preferredRequirements: Intermediate to expert Power BI knowledge
impliedStrategicGoals: Support growth and innovation in English-speaking markets
Increase impact and efficiency of analysis
possibleHeadlineFacts: 25 days annual leave plus bank holidays
2+ years contact centre data experience essential

personalisedContent.heroPositioning: Operational leader who turns data into decisions people will actually use.
personalisedContent.personalisedOpening: I’m applying because this role sits right at the point where I do my best work: turning operational data into clear action, then helping people trust and use it. I’ve led performance, reporting and improvement in complex environments, and I’m comfortable working with stakeholders who need analysis that is practical, credible and tied to outcomes.
personalisedContent.whyThisCompany: Foundever stands out to me because it combines global scale with a very client-facing model. The brief points to a business that is still growing, still investing in analytics, and still looking for people who can help shape how insight supports customers and revenue.
personalisedContent.whyThisRole: This feels like a strong fit because the work is not just analysis for its own sake. It needs someone who can build insight, explain it clearly, test recommendations, and help clients and internal teams act on it. That is the kind of role where I can bring structure, judgement and follow-through.

selectedEvidenceExamples.exampleTitle: Complex annual projects and team leadership
selectedEvidenceExamples.bestMatchedRoleNeed: stakeholder management and delivery in a data-sensitive environment
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: I’ve worked in a regulated, data-sensitive setting where I had to manage complex workloads, maintain service standards and support a team through business-critical projects. That gives me a good base for client-facing analytics work where accuracy, pace and communication all matter.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as a credibility anchor for stakeholder handling, workload control and trusted delivery.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I’ve delivered under pressure in a data-sensitive environment while keeping service standards intact.

selectedEvidenceExamples.bestMatchedRoleNeed: business case development and ROI thinking
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: This example shows that I’m comfortable linking operational changes to financial outcomes, not just reporting numbers. I’ve helped improve profit, release working capital and strengthen cash performance, which is directly relevant where analytics needs to support business cases and investment decisions.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as the strongest proof point for ROI, commercial impact and recommendation quality.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I’m used to connecting operational decisions to financial results and cash impact.

selectedEvidenceExamples.exampleTitle: Cross-site continuous improvement across European theme parks
selectedEvidenceExamples.bestMatchedRoleNeed: insight-led improvement and working across multiple stakeholders
selectedEvidenceExamples.whyChosen: I’ve led improvement work across multiple sites using operational data and frontline insight to strengthen execution standards. That is close to the kind of analytical problem-solving this role needs, especially where findings have to land with different teams and lead to practical change.
selectedEvidenceExamples.suggestedUsage: Use as a supporting example for insight generation, cross-functional working and implementation.
selectedEvidenceExamples.shortLine: I’ve used operational data and frontline insight to improve standards across multiple sites.

personalisedContent.roleNeedsSummary: Based on the brief, this role needs more than reporting. It needs someone who can understand the client problem, shape the analysis, present it well, and stay involved until the recommendation has actually landed. It also needs commercial judgement, because the work feeds both service improvement and sales support.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Contact centre or customer-facing operational data experience
experienceMappings.myEvidence: My background is not in a contact centre environment, but I have worked in customer-facing and service-led settings where performance, demand, service quality and stakeholder expectations had to be managed closely.
experienceMappings.relevance: I can bring transferable operational analysis discipline, but I would be careful not to overstate direct contact centre experience.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve used operational data and frontline insight to improve execution standards across multiple sites, and I’m comfortable turning that into practical recommendations.
experienceMappings.relevance: This shows I can move from data to action, which is central to the role.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve supported a team through business-critical work in a high-security environment, where clear communication and dependable delivery mattered.
experienceMappings.relevance: The role needs someone who can build trust with clients, operations and senior stakeholders.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: My CV includes Power BI in my core skills, and I’ve built senior reporting across workflow, room utilisation, payroll and contractual income in my current role.
experienceMappings.relevance: This supports the reporting and dashboarding side of the job, even though the advert asks for stronger hands-on BI depth.

experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve supported a £149.9k improvement in profit before appropriation, released £33.3k of working capital and helped increase cash at bank by £172.6k year on year.
experienceMappings.relevance: That is directly relevant to building a case for change and showing value.

experienceMappings.roleNeed: Independent working and managing multiple projects
experienceMappings.myEvidence: I’ve led day-to-day operations during a scale-up phase and managed improvement activity across several sites, which meant balancing priorities and keeping delivery moving.
experienceMappings.relevance: The role calls for someone who can work independently across multiple client demands.

focusAreasToBring.title: Turning analysis into action
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would focus on making the output usable: clear recommendations, simple visuals, and enough context for clients to act without needing the analysis explained twice.

focusAreasToBring.title: Commercially useful insight
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would look for the link between performance data and business outcomes, so the work supports process improvement, customer experience and revenue decisions rather than reporting alone.

focusAreasToBring.title: Trusted stakeholder support
focusAreasToBring.summary: I would aim to be steady and responsive with clients and internal teams, especially where the work needs buy-in from people with different priorities.

personalisedContent.fitSummary: I bring a background in operational leadership, reporting and improvement across regulated, service-led and customer-facing environments. I’ve worked with performance data, financial control and stakeholder management in settings where the standard was not just to analyse, but to improve how the operation actually worked. That makes me a credible fit for a role that needs insight, judgement and follow-through.
personalisedContent.likelyContributionSummary: Based on what the brief describes, I would expect to spend the first months getting close to the client problems, understanding the data landscape, and building trust with the people who use the outputs. I’d then focus on producing clear dashboards, sharper recommendations and stronger business cases, while staying involved long enough to see whether the changes are working and where they need adjusting.
companyHighlights: Foundever is a global BPO and customer experience business.
The company operates across 60+ languages and 170,000 people worldwide.
The role is remote and sits within a business that is still growing its English-speaking markets.
personalisedContent.cultureFitSummary: I work best in environments where people want practical answers, not just analysis for its own sake. The brief suggests a collaborative, fast-moving setting with room for ownership, and that suits how I like to work.

first90DaysPlan.focus: Understand the client and data context
first90DaysPlan.detail: I would get close to the current analytics outputs, the main stakeholders, and the data sources behind the work, so I can understand what is already trusted and where the gaps are.
I would concentrate on improving the clarity of dashboards, reports and presentations, and on translating client objectives into analysis that is easy to use.
I would look to strengthen the link between insight and action by helping test recommendations, build business cases, and track whether changes are delivering the expected result.

personalisedContent.closingSummary: I would bring a steady, commercially minded approach to analytics work that needs to be trusted by clients, operations and senior stakeholders.
closingProofPoints: I’ve improved profit, cash and working capital through tighter operational control.
I’ve built senior reporting across workflow, utilisation and income measures.
I’ve led improvement work across multiple sites using operational data and frontline insight.
contentNotes: I have not claimed direct contact centre analytics experience because the CV evidence provided does not show it clearly, and the advert treats it as essential.
I have used Power BI from the CV core skills and reporting context, but I have not overstated advanced technical depth beyond what is evidenced.

The evidence bank is stronger on operational improvement, reporting and financial control than on pure analytics tooling, so I’ve framed fit around transferable analytical leadership and practical delivery.

examples.title: “Cross-site continuous improvement across European theme parks”
